name: Londontown Terrace Crab Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion rings and celery in butter until the onions are soft and golden.
2. Alternate layers of crab, cheese (you may use sharp cheddar, Swiss, or any preferred variety), and onion/celery mix into the pie shell.
3. In a bowl, beat together eggs, half and half, salt, and pepper.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the layered ingredients in the pastry shell.
5. Bake at 400 degrees for about 30-40 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool slightly before cutting.
Tuna, salmon, shrimp, or flaked fish can be substituted for crabmeat.
